examples: What animation was produced in Studio Ghibli?
Ghibli is one top animation studio in Japan.
Many top animated films in Japan are produced by Ghibli.
The Ni No Kuni: Wrath of the White Witch trailer from E3 2012 shows many Ghibli preoccupations.
Ghibli created the animated cutscenes, and thus defined the look of the game.
